channel.title: The New Beverly Cinema
channel.description: Schedule and program for The New Beverly Cinema (Quentin Tarantino's revival theater in Los Angeles).

item.title: Deep Throat (Adults Only) / Hot Summer in the City (Adults Only)
item.description:
How far does a girl have to go to untangle her tingle? A sexually frustrated woman finally uncovers an unconventional solution to help her climax. One of the key films that launched porno chic, Deep Throat helped ignite a cinematic revolution, garnering major box office success and enduring controversies (behind the scenes and beyond), while fighting a multitude of obscenity battles and bans along the way. The first XXX film lensed in Michigan! Set during the long, hot summer of 1967 and its impending real-life confrontations in Detroit, Hot Summer in the City pushes the boundaries of pornographic entertainment, injecting roughie violence and exploitation themes into its hardcore sex storyline. With genuine Top 40 hits playing in the background, a group of Black Militants kidnap a young white virgin in a plan to set off race riots throughout the suburbs. ADULTS ONLY – All attendees must be 18+ w/ ID for admission
Cast: Director: Gerard Damiano | Starring: Linda Lovelace, Harry Reems, Dolly Sharp, Carol Connors | Year: 1972 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm | Director: Gail Palmer | Starring: Lisa Baker, Duke Johnson, Shorty Roberts, Stitch Umbas, Coke Chain, Black Orchid | Year: 1976 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm
Durata: 55 minuti

Orari: Sun March 01 - 6:30 pm / 8:00 pm

item.title: Deep Throat (Adults Only) / Hot Summer in the City (Adults Only)
item.description:
How far does a girl have to go to untangle her tingle? A sexually frustrated woman finally uncovers an unconventional solution to help her climax. One of the key films that launched porno chic, Deep Throat helped ignite a cinematic revolution, garnering major box office success and enduring controversies (behind the scenes and beyond), while fighting a multitude of obscenity battles and bans along the way. The first XXX film lensed in Michigan! Set during the long, hot summer of 1967 and its impending real-life confrontations in Detroit, Hot Summer in the City pushes the boundaries of pornographic entertainment, injecting roughie violence and exploitation themes into its hardcore sex storyline. With genuine Top 40 hits playing in the background, a group of Black Militants kidnap a young white virgin in a plan to set off race riots throughout the suburbs. ADULTS ONLY – All attendees must be 18+ w/ ID for admission
Cast: Director: Gerard Damiano | Starring: Linda Lovelace, Harry Reems, Dolly Sharp, Carol Connors | Year: 1972 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm | Director: Gail Palmer | Starring: Lisa Baker, Duke Johnson, Shorty Roberts, Stitch Umbas, Coke Chain, Black Orchid | Year: 1976 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm
Durata: 55 minuti

Orari: Sat February 28 - 7:00 pm / 8:30 pm

item.title: Once Upon A Time In… Hollywood
item.description:
Quentin Tarantino’s Once Upon a Time in… Hollywood visits 1969 Los Angeles, where everything is changing, as TV star Rick Dalton (Leonardo DiCaprio) and his longtime stunt double Cliff Booth (Brad Pitt) make their way around an industry they hardly recognize anymore. The ninth film from the writer-director features a large ensemble cast and multiple storylines in a tribute to the final moments of Hollywood’s golden age. “The film is Quentin Tarantino’s magnum opus – a sweeping statement on an entire generation of American popular culture and an almost expressionistic rendering of the counterculture forming at its margins, gradually growing in influence.” – Sam C. Mac, Slant Magazine “As a film about making films, and the agony and ecstasy of everything we love about movies, Tarantino knocks it out of the park.” – Hannah Woodhead, Little White Lies “It’s a heady, engrossing, kaleidoscopic, spectacularly detailed nostalgic splatter collage of a film, an epic tale of backlot Hollywood in 1969” – Owen Gleiberman, Variety “An absolute blast, a pure, giddy rush of thrillingly confident, expansive filmmaking that showcases the most resonant and satisfying storytelling Tarantino has given us” – Jessica Kiang, Sight & Sound
Cast: Director: Quentin Tarantino | Writer: Quentin Tarantino | Starring: Leonardo DiCaprio, Brad Pitt, Margot Robbie, Emile Hirsch, Margaret Qualley, Timothy Olyphant, Austin Butler, Dakota Fanning, Bruce Dern, Al Pacino | Year: 2019 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm
Durata: 161 minuti

Orari: Fri February 27 - 11:59 pm

item.title: Caligula: The Ultimate Cut
item.description:
An extensive reconstruction of the notorious spectacle presented in 35mm! Absolute power corrupts in Caligula: The Ultimate Cut , an extensive reconstruction of the notorious 1980 spectacle. Shadowed by the murder of his family, Caligula (Malcolm McDowell) eliminates his devious adoptive grandfather (Peter O’Toole) and seizes control of the Roman Empire alongside his wife Caesonia (Helen Mirren) before descending into a spiral of depravity, destruction, and madness.
Cast: Director: Principal photography by Tino Brass; Ultimate Cut produced by Thomas Negovan | Writer: Adapted from an original screenplay by Gore Vidal | Starring: Malcolm McDowell, Helen Mirren, Teresa Ann Savoy, Peter O'Toole, John Steiner, Guido Mannari, Paolo Bonacelli, Leopoldo Trieste, Giancarlo Badessi, Mirella D'Angelo, Anneka Di Lorenzo, Lori Wagner, Adriana Asti, John Gielgud | Year: 1979/2023 | Country: Italy/USA | Format: 35mm
Durata: 178 minuti

Orari: Fri February 27 - 6:30 pm

item.title: Paranoia / The Sweet Body of Deborah (IB Tech Print)
item.description:
“Love is the tool that strips a jet-set widow bare of her morals and her millions!”  This was the first of four giallo collaborations Carroll Baker did with Italian director Umberto Lenzi ( Almost Human ) and it remains the most popular. Lonely widow Baker flies to Italy with her lawyer, who is settling her wealthy husband’s estate, and takes up residence in a secluded villa. Soon after arriving, a penniless playboy (Lou Castel) suffers a car breakdown outside her gates. She allows him to repair it in her driveway. One thing leads to another, they end up in bed, and he insinuates himself into her life. Out of the blue, Castel’s bisexual “sister” (Colette Descombes) shows up, and Baker feels a growing uneasiness. Mind games escalate: debauched threesomes, playing a pop single repeatedly to annoy Baker, and finally drugging her and tying her to her bed. A mix of real suspense and Valley of the Dolls -style dramatics, elevated by Baker’s uninhibited performance (including a generous helping of gratuitous nudity) delivers, as do two – yes, two – wild twist endings. Riddle, riddle, Debbie in the middle. Surprise, surprise, guess who dies? Newlywed bliss turns to terror when the happy husband learns his former fiancé is dead. As mysterious threats roll in holding him responsible, a voyeuristic neighbor begins fixating on the new bride. An early jet set giallo pulsing with sensuality and packed with psychological thrills, stunning locations, and a glamorous cast. Genre faves Carroll Baker, Jean Sorel, Evelyn Stewart, Luigi Pistilli, and George Hilton star, with a twist-filled screenplay by Torso ’s Ernesto Gastaldi.
Cast: Director: Umberto Lenzi | Writer: Umberto Lenzi | Starring: Carroll Baker, Lou Castel, Colette Descombes, Tino Carraro | Year: 1969 | Country: Italy/France | Format: 35mm | Director: Romolo Guerrieri | Writer: Screenplay by Ernesto Gastaldi, Story by Ernesto Gastaldi and Luciano Martino | Starring: Carroll Baker, Jean Sorel, Evelyn Stewart, Luigi Pistilli | Year: 1968 | Country: Italy/France | Format: I.B. Technicolor 35mm
Durata: 96 minuti

Orari: Tue February 24 - 7:30 pm / 9:30 pm

item.title: The Girl From Starship Venus / Flesh Gordon
item.description:
2069… A Space Sexploration! In the softcore sci-fi satire The Girl From Starship Venus , a Venusian spacecraft lands in London and its alien visitor transforms into a beautifully buxom human female, resulting in a swinging string of hilariously sexy encounters in porn shops, massage parlors and strip joints in a campy quest to investigate the inhabitants of our strange planet. German cheesecake model Monika Ringwald stars, drawing big laughs from deadpan comedy in a film that Quentin Tarantino calls one of the top 20 grindhouse classics! “Even as a kid I knew I would get things from The Girl From Starship Venus that I wouldn’t get from the Hollywood films” – Quentin Tarantino Porn pioneers Bill Osco, Howard Ziehm and Michael Benveniste conjured this soft sexploitation spoof, with Flesh (Jason Williams) and Dale Ardor (Suzanne Fields) the only survivors of a plane incapacitated by sex rays from space. Encountering Dr. Jerkoff (Joseph Hudgins), who has already built a phallic spaceship to travel to the planet Porno to investigate, the three blast off to the domain of galactic emperor, Wang the Perverted (William Hunt). Despite tortures and encounters with odd monsters such as Penisauruses, Flesh escapes, aided by libidinous Queen Amora. Wang shoots down their ship, but Flesh survives to reunite with Dr. Jerkoff. Wang’s intentions of marrying Dale are foiled when Nellie (Candy Samples), chief of the Amazonian lesbians kidnaps her. Flesh and Jerkoff rescue Dale, aided by gay Prince Precious and his forest tribe. When Jerkoff confronts Wang with a new weapon, Wang brings to life the giant idol, the Great God Porno to prevent his prey from escaping. “A goofy, corny, sexually outrageous tribute… complete with up-to-date special effects, kitschy costumes, and godawful acting… a huge amount of fun” – Mondo Digital
Cast: Director: Derek Ford | Starring: Monika Ringwald, Mark Jones, Andrew Grant, Tony Kenyon, David Rayner, Beatrice Shaw | Year: 1975 | Country: UK | Format: 35mm | Director: Howard Ziehm and Michael Benveniste | Starring: Jason Williams, Suzanne Fields, Joseph Hudgins, William Dennis Hurt, Candy Samples | Year: 1974 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm
Durata: 67 minuti

Orari: Mon February 23 - 7:30 pm / 9:20 pm

item.title: Paranoia / The Sweet Body of Deborah (IB Tech Print)
item.description:
“Love is the tool that strips a jet-set widow bare of her morals and her millions!”  This was the first of four giallo collaborations Carroll Baker did with Italian director Umberto Lenzi ( Almost Human ) and it remains the most popular. Lonely widow Baker flies to Italy with her lawyer, who is settling her wealthy husband’s estate, and takes up residence in a secluded villa. Soon after arriving, a penniless playboy (Lou Castel) suffers a car breakdown outside her gates. She allows him to repair it in her driveway. One thing leads to another, they end up in bed, and he insinuates himself into her life. Out of the blue, Castel’s bisexual “sister” (Colette Descombes) shows up, and Baker feels a growing uneasiness. Mind games escalate: debauched threesomes, playing a pop single repeatedly to annoy Baker, and finally drugging her and tying her to her bed. A mix of real suspense and Valley of the Dolls -style dramatics, elevated by Baker’s uninhibited performance (including a generous helping of gratuitous nudity) delivers, as do two – yes, two – wild twist endings. Riddle, riddle, Debbie in the middle. Surprise, surprise, guess who dies? Newlywed bliss turns to terror when the happy husband learns his former fiancé is dead. As mysterious threats roll in holding him responsible, a voyeuristic neighbor begins fixating on the new bride. An early jet set giallo pulsing with sensuality and packed with psychological thrills, stunning locations, and a glamorous cast. Genre faves Carroll Baker, Jean Sorel, Evelyn Stewart, Luigi Pistilli, and George Hilton star, with a twist-filled screenplay by Torso ’s Ernesto Gastaldi.
Cast: Director: Umberto Lenzi | Writer: Umberto Lenzi | Starring: Carroll Baker, Lou Castel, Colette Descombes, Tino Carraro | Year: 1969 | Country: Italy/France | Format: 35mm | Director: Romolo Guerrieri | Writer: Screenplay by Ernesto Gastaldi, Story by Ernesto Gastaldi and Luciano Martino | Starring: Carroll Baker, Jean Sorel, Evelyn Stewart, Luigi Pistilli | Year: 1968 | Country: Italy/France | Format: I.B. Technicolor 35mm
Durata: 96 minuti

Orari: Wed February 25 - 7:30 pm / 9:30 pm

item.title: Caligula: The Ultimate Cut (Special Guest)
item.description:
Just added! Aaron Shaps, editor of The Ultimate Cut and author of Caligula: The Official Story of the Film from Titan Books, will join us IN PERSON, schedule permitting, to discuss the film at our Thursday 2/26 show. An extensive reconstruction of the notorious spectacle presented in 35mm! Absolute power corrupts in Caligula: The Ultimate Cut , an extensive reconstruction of the notorious 1980 spectacle. Shadowed by the murder of his family, Caligula (Malcolm McDowell) eliminates his devious adoptive grandfather (Peter O’Toole) and seizes control of the Roman Empire alongside his wife Caesonia (Helen Mirren) before descending into a spiral of depravity, destruction, and madness.
Cast: Director: Principal photography by Tino Brass; Ultimate Cut produced by Thomas Negovan | Writer: Adapted from an original screenplay by Gore Vidal | Starring: Malcolm McDowell, Helen Mirren, Teresa Ann Savoy, Peter O'Toole, John Steiner, Guido Mannari, Paolo Bonacelli, Leopoldo Trieste, Giancarlo Badessi, Mirella D'Angelo, Anneka Di Lorenzo, Lori Wagner, Adriana Asti, John Gielgud | Year: 1979/2023 | Country: Italy/USA | Format: 35mm
Durata: 178 minuti

Orari: Thu February 26 - 7:30 pm

item.title: Blonde Ambition (Adults Only)
item.description:
Whisked away to the big city, Candy and her ditsy sister Sugar Kane will finally get their shot at Broadway success. One of the funniest and most opulent X-rated films ever produced, The Amero Brothers’ love letter to the golden age of Hollywood musicals is a tour de force of burlesque humor, uproarious sight gags, and madcap set pieces, all culminating in one of the most outrageous finales in hardcore film history
Cast: Director: John and Lem Amero | Starring: Suzy Mandel, Dory Devon, Eric Edwards, R.Bolla, Wade Nichols, Molly Malone, Kurt Mann, Erica Eaton, David Morris, Pat Finnegan | Year: 1981 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm
Durata: 83 minuti

Orari: Sat February 28 - 11:59 pm

item.title: Through the Looking Glass (Adults Only) / Bacchanale (Adults Only) / Bonus SECRET Third Movie (Adults Only)
item.description:
While our allotment of advance tickets has sold out online, some additional tickets will be available to purchase at the door on a first come, first served basis on the night of the show. Box office & doors open approximately 1 hour before showtime. For shows that have sold out online, in-person ticket purchases are limited to 2 tickets per person. Catherine’s life is one of luxury. But since the death of her beloved father, her stately family home, luxurious car, and refined sensibilities have not brought her happiness. Aloof and disinterested in her husband and daughter, Catherine prefers to spend her evenings engaged in sensual fantasies while sitting amongst the items from her childhood bedroom, now stored in a dark attic. But one stormy night, while seated in front of a large mirror, her father – or a demon in his shape – appears in the reflection, promising her untold pleasures and happiness if she simply comes through the glass. Frightened at first, Catherine eventually gives in and begins to visit the steadily more sinister world inside the mirror. But with each dream-like trip, the dark truths of her past, which she has tried so long to forget, start becoming more and more clear, all as the sinister power of temptation becomes wholly irresistible…  An unsettling supernatural thriller which explores the terror of long buried trauma, director Jonas Middleton ( Just Before Dawn ) and screenwriter Ron Wertheim’s ( Memories Within Miss Aggie ) genre defying masterpiece, Through the Looking Glass , ranks as one of the finest examples of hardcore filmmaking ever produced. Assembling a outstanding cast headed by Catherine Burgess ( Cinderella 2000 , Expose Me Lovely ), Jamie Gillis ( Dracula Sucks ), Teri Hall ( The Story of Joanna ), Kim Pope ( The Intrusion ), and Roger Caine ( Martin ) and featuring an acclaimed original score composed by Arlon Ober ( Eating Raoul ) and Harry Manfredini ( Friday the 13th ). (Mélusine) The Amero Brothers helm a crossover of arthouse and hardcore, mixing the strange & surreal, erotic & artistic, to craft a truly one-of-a-kind NYC underground classic. A tormented woman goes through Dante’s Inferno, processing her own feelings through a series of haunting sexual fantasies and stark dreamscapes. A previously-thought-lost XXX ultra-rarity uncovered by the Vinegar Syndrome archivists! Be the first audience in nearly 50 years to experience this must-see rediscovery, with the title remaining top secret until the film unspools on screen.
Cast: Director: Jonas Middleton | Starring: Jamie Gillis, Catherine Burgess, Kim Pope, Terri Hall, Roger Caine | Year: 1976 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm | Director: John and Lem Amero | Starring: Uta Erickson | Year: 1970 | Country: USA | Format: 35mm
Durata: 75 minuti

Orari: Sun February 22 - 6:30 pm / 8:30 pm / 10:05 pm
